channel.title: Manusha's Daily Drive
channel.description: A personalized daily briefing on AI, anime, and your favorite creators.

item.title: Jun 12, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5, a Safety-First 'Mythos-Class' Model
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5, a Safety-First 'Mythos-Class' Model — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivAFBVV95cUxPX1Y1SEJHU3pmVVVvU3JYeDdscVRnUXdIVlQ3czVwa3JJTkR0UjdJZzJUZnhFMi1lSHdYSS1vTTVMVUpSX0NCVVZnZFpYRHBNMFBYZHJmOWdBQTRlMThscmJiRGFpOWFGdVlFZkx1SGdVMnQ2ZktOQnFhZDFDVHNkTkhvU3JvNWNOVG4tU0VoOWNGYWw4R3ZXM1laUVB5V1RxZ21tYnNyMGFvWVlFQXZYSFV3ZG41VjZ1bmRyUw?oc=5 [AI] Google DeepMind Releases DiffusionGemma, a 26B Open-Source Model Generating Text 4x Faster via Diffusion — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNcXRFZjNBMjQwSWRoT2lrczRIMXpkUmZNM3FranYxZE1uNHM2ZXhKSEdxQ3ViVHlYMWVTT3NZMm91NHlCZFFLeENna2VPUEIycXlpaXVNSVphdU40WUp6N09UTlpqVTBoR0tETDZQTEVtWTlocU9NX3FHWFUtOGpBcnBiRGMxY3FzeXZqZ3BacWh4ZlVEa28yNmlqbTNjWnpkUjdEY1VqMnd3M0lKV2VaNElMZUdnV2dxdHFPVHJicERHNi1aalZF?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI May Launch GPT-5.6 This Month; Eyes Price Cuts Amid Anthropic Competition — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxPaFpMYXpqS0JjazBFdlpKbVdJT2xiR1hGNmFEUUNyaG10a0dpNW00X2N5NEdycDJMMzFrNzZXR0RZcy1HMmZIaHJLMWNfTnRDZW52bmVwT18xZ0JFbEF5ME5taVg4N2NfQjJuYVphT2VBM25yXzR6ZkxZd04zOUpINVNQNkdBdw?oc=5 [AI] Xiaomi Open-Sources MiMo Code, an Agentic AI Coding Harness That Outperforms Claude Code on Ultra-Long Tasks — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Anthropic CEO Calls for Government Power to Block High-Risk AI Models; Pledges $350 Million for Safety — https://news.google.?oc=5 [Anime] My Hero Academia Final Season Wins Anime of the Year at 2026 Crunchyroll Anime Awards — https://news.google.?oc=5 [Anime] Made in Abyss Announces New Theatrical Anime Series, First Film "Awakening of the Mystery" Set for 2026 — https://news.google.com/rBMiUEFVX3lxTFB6WklsYUpJb1ZtRjEwQVpnYjRIb3JLa01rTHc5RVNVOG9Rc2RuMWpCYVQzOHhHbjZ3anBVSkhrNTdEWVotS0IteHBhclpnX1FI?oc=5 [Anime] JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run Anime Voice Cast Revealed, Netflix Global Simulcast Confirmed — https://news.google.com/rBMiUEFVX3lxTE9QcXZvVVpfeWo2Y3dZX3RzUkVSWUp4VTFCSTdQNXNmNDRpdkxDbjVPZWV3aUU4bjNVYkhXQ0E5YnBpWGg1MnlnR1RoSlBIaFpp?oc=5 [Anime] The Ghost in the Shell TV Anime Unveils New Trailer, Ending Song by MILLENNIUM PARADE, AX 2026 Premiere Confirmed — https://news.google.com/rBMitwFBVV95cUxNQ3I1Vkk3MmVKcm9YdllJSDBxa2ZXMjJMZHE3ams4QUhuenJYVTcwOUp1cC1GNkg5eHdhcExXaEswT29EZm1FQUFNT0dGd3k1Q2hTaWtjRFRORTlLajlxak5QSHAzZkl3STVuZmZjbXhSUTVDcnhvOWxBQUZxb0VrVk9CTjFwb2F0eUQ2d3ZmclR5N0hxREVSdW9FRExFOGM1emdEOFhyZ1dRLXJVV3JKWVl5Z1VvNFE?oc=5 [Anime] Grand Blue Dreaming Season 3 Reveals July 6 Premiere Date in New Trailer — https://news.google.com/rBMiuAFBVV95cUxNOElaWkJ1cE1xZmZxMFNXakVldzFNRHJjam1GSmRWMDVNN2xFNlJjZjV4U1ZUUy01NWNfQk05TVVyVHkzSm80bkNoY1NXaHZfTWNGZ0JkTzBFZWdRMElmZTd0VkZBemllU0xWS0xlZUg4MHEzdGhpZGFKQ3JLemxVV2IwVmxuc3c1cS1SdmZvblZSSkUxeHZFVW1oVkF6R3NLSGdQZHpoOWJ4ZHVfQVA5OFlzUndoZS1z?oc=5 [Anime] Dorohedoro Season 2 Confirmed for April 2026 Premiere — Six-Year Wait Is Over — https://news.google.com/rBMiUEFVX3lxTFA5ZFlYRFVwZUtFU2pmV1RyckF6eVBPUWplUkRQRFY4UGxEN3hweWE4SVJESEI5SG00ZS1aVFMyVXZIUFJMVWxJa3Judmh3d1h6?oc=5 [YouTube/Fireship] Anthropic begged the world to stop AI… then shipped this — https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1PBRhm5ZnjU

item.title: Jun 11, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Mythos-Class Claude Fable 5 AI Model
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Releases Mythos-Class Claude Fable 5 AI Model — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9pX0VvdkNzRF9kQVpXNGtSSnRrTFhyZkxwX1pTLVZNMkJuV0tRa05URjRQaEMxUks1cEpyY0JDRTVqTkxkMk9GT01BSFFfemRYXzlia2xYemZ6X1k?oc=5 [AI] Google AI Releases —
